title_en: 2. When whims and desires prevail, the religious motive is diminished. The doomed
title_id: 2. Ketika hawa nafsu dan keinginan menguasai, motivasi agama melemah. Orang yang celaka
content_en:
person will surrender totally to Shaytân and his forces, who will lead him wherever they want. His relationship with them will be either of two possibilities. Either he will become their follower and a soldier in their army, which is the case of the weak person, or Shaytân will become a weapon for him, and one of his soldiers, which is the case of the strong person who rebels against Allâh. Those people are the ones whose misfortune has overtaken them, as they preferred this world to the Hereafter. The main reason for their sorry fate is that they ran out of patience. The major characteristic of these people is that they lie and cheat, indulge in wishful thinking and self-admiration, delay doing good deeds, and prefer instant gains in this world to lasting gains in the Hereafter. These are the people to whom the Prophet (SAAS) referred when he said: "The helpless man is the one who follows his whims and desires, and indulges in wishful thinking." These unfortunate people are of several types. Some of them declare war against Allâh and His Messenger, trying to destroy what the Prophet (SAAS) brought, pushing people away from the way of Allâh, and spreading corruption on earth. Some are interested solely in their worldly interests. Some are two faced hypocrites who try to ingratiate themselves with everybody and gain something from every situation. Some are promiscuous, and devote their entire life to the pursuit of physical pleasure. Some, if they are warned, say that they would dearly love to repent, find it too difficult and plead they have no chance. Some say that Allâh does not need their prayers and fasting, that they will not attain salvation by virtue of their deed, and that they will rely on the fact that Allâh is Merciful. Some of them claim that refraining from committing wrong actions is like undermining the forgiveness of Allâh. Some will say, "What good could my worship do after all the wrong actions I have committed? What can help a drowning man if his fingers are above water and the rest of his body is submerged?" Some say that they will repent when death approaches... So many excuses, all because their whims and desires control their reason, and they use their reason, in turn, to find ways of fulfilling those desires. Their reason is held prisoner by the Shaytân, and put to work to serve his evil purposes, just as Muslim prisoners-ofwar may be

abused by the kâfirûn and forced to look after pigs, make wine or carry the cross. The man who suppresses his reason and puts it under the control of the enemy (Shayân) is like the one who seizes a Muslim and hands him over to the kâfirûn to imprison him.
content_id:
akan menyerah sepenuhnya kepada setan dan pasukannya, yang akan membawanya ke mana mereka inginkan. Hubungannya dengan mereka akan menjadi salah satu dari dua kemungkinan. Entah ia akan menjadi pengikut mereka dan prajurit dalam pasukan mereka, yang merupakan keadaan orang yang lemah, atau setan akan menjadi senjata baginya, dan salah satu prajuritnya, yang merupakan keadaan orang yang kuat yang memberontak terhadap Allah. Orang-orang itu adalah orang-orang yang kemalangan telah menguasai mereka, karena mereka lebih memilih dunia daripada akhirat. Alasan utama nasib buruk mereka adalah bahwa mereka kehabisan kesabaran. Ciri utama orang-orang ini adalah bahwa mereka berbohong dan menipu, memanjakan diri dalam angan-angan dan kekaguman pada diri sendiri, menunda-nunda amal kebaikan, dan lebih memilih keuntungan instan di dunia ini daripada keuntungan yang abadi di akhirat. Mereka inilah yang dimaksud Nabi ﷺ ketika beliau bersabda: "Orang yang tidak berdaya adalah orang yang mengikuti hawa nafsu dan keinginannya, dan memanjakan diri dalam angan-angan." Orang-orang yang malang ini terdiri dari beberapa jenis. Sebagian dari mereka menyatakan perang terhadap Allah dan Rasul-Nya, mencoba menghancurkan apa yang dibawa Nabi ﷺ, mendorong orang-orang menjauh dari jalan Allah, dan menyebarkan kerusakan di muka bumi. Sebagian hanya tertarik pada kepentingan duniawi mereka. Sebagian adalah munafik bermuka dua yang mencoba menyenangkan semua orang dan mendapatkan sesuatu dari setiap situasi. Sebagian bersikap tidak bermoral, dan mendedikasikan seluruh hidup mereka untuk mengejar kesenangan fisik. Sebagian, jika diperingatkan, berkata bahwa mereka sangat ingin bertaubat, merasa terlalu sulit, dan berdalih tidak punya kesempatan. Sebagian berkata bahwa Allah tidak membutuhkan shalat dan puasa mereka, bahwa mereka tidak akan memperoleh keselamatan berkat amal perbuatan mereka, dan bahwa mereka akan bergantung pada kenyataan bahwa Allah Maha Pengasih. Sebagian dari mereka mengklaim bahwa menahan diri dari melakukan perbuatan salah sama seperti merusak ampunan Allah. Sebagian akan berkata, "Apa gunanya ibadahku setelah semua perbuatan salah yang telah aku lakukan? Apa yang dapat menolong orang yang tenggelam jika jari-jarinya berada di atas air dan sisa tubuhnya terendam?" Sebagian berkata bahwa mereka akan bertaubat ketika ajal mendekat... Begitu banyak alasan, semua karena hawa nafsu dan keinginan mereka mengendalikan akal mereka, dan mereka menggunakan akal mereka, pada gilirannya, untuk menemukan cara memenuhi keinginan-keinginan tersebut. Akal mereka ditahan sebagai tawanan oleh setan, dan dipekerjakan untuk melayani tujuan jahatnya, seperti halnya para tawanan perang Muslim yang mungkin

disiksa oleh orang-orang kafir dan dipaksa untuk mengurus babi, membuat minuman keras, atau membawa salib. Orang yang menekan akalnya dan meletakkannya di bawah kendali musuh (setan) ibarat orang yang menangkap seorang Muslim dan menyerahkannya kepada orang-orang kafir untuk dipenjara.
content_ar: person will surrender totally to Shaytân and his forces, who will lead him wherever they want. His relationship with them will be either of two possibilities. Either he will become their follower and a soldier in their army, which is the case of the weak person, or Shaytân will become a weapon for him, and one of his soldiers, which is the case of the strong person who rebels against Allâh. Those people are the ones whose misfortune has overtaken them, as they preferred this الدنيا to الآخرة. The الرئيسي العقل for their sorry fate is that they ran out of الصبر. The major characteristic of these people is that they lie and cheat, indulge in wishful thinking and self-admiration, delay doing الخير deeds, and prefer instant gains in this الدنيا to lasting gains in الآخرة. These are the people to whom النبي ﷺ (SAAS) referred عندما قال: "The helpless man is the one who follows his whims and desires, and indulges in wishful thinking." These unfortunate people are of several types. Some of them declare war against Allâh and His Messenger, trying to destroy what النبي ﷺ (SAAS) brought, pushing people away from the الطريق of Allâh, and spreading corruption on earth. Some are interested solely in their worldly interests. Some are two faced hypocrites who try to ingratiate themselves with everybody and gain something from every situation. Some are promiscuous, and devote their entire الحياة to the pursuit of physical pleasure. Some, إذا they are warned, say that they would dearly المحبة to repent, find it أيضاً difficult and plead they have no chance. Some say that Allâh does not need their الصلوات and الصيام, that they will not attain النجاة by الفضيلة of their deed, and that they will rely on the fact that Allâh is Merciful. Some of them claim that refraining from committing الخطأ actions is like undermining the المغفرة of Allâh. Some will say, "What الخير could my worship do بعد all the الخطأ actions I have committed? What can help a drowning man إذا his fingers are above water and the rest of his الجسد is submerged?" Some say that they will repent عندما الموت approaches... لذا many excuses, all لأن their whims and desires control their العقل, and they use their العقل, in turn, to find ways of fulfilling those desires. Their العقل is held prisoner by the Shaytân, and put to work to serve his الشر purposes, just as مسلم prisoners-ofwar may be abused by the kâfirûn and forced to look بعد pigs, make wine or carry the cross. The man who suppresses his العقل and puts it under the control of the enemy (Shayân) is like the one who seizes a مسلم and hands him over to the kâfirûn to imprison him.
